# best

My life-optimization workspace: a meta-repo where each leaf folder in the map below is
its own Git repository (not a submodule). Their files aren't tracked here — because git
won't reach across a nested `.git`, the parent shows only this map, and each link opens
the child repo where its files actually live.

Regenerated from `repos.yaml` by `.workspace/sync-repos.py`; run it after adding or
removing a nested repo.

<!-- BEGIN managed repo map -->
<!-- Generated by .workspace/sync-repos.py from repos.yaml. Do not edit by hand. -->
